PHASE: (trpc-client-procedure-type-missing) RESOLVED as not-a-bug on `fix/trpc-client-procedure-type-missing`. Investigation on the branch (`e832987` baseline, no source-code changes since `d364462`) confirms the underlying "myBoundDepartmentIds query stuck pending on fresh clients" symptom was downstream of [[fresh-client-presence-snapshot-race]] and ALREADY fixed by `d364462`'s presence:ready handshake (per that 🟡 entry's own cascade narrative). The `TypeError: client[procedureType] is not a function at @trpc/client/dist/index.mjs:184:31` observed post-fix in the prior session was a [[trpc-proxy-debug-inspection-trap]] firing on DevTools eval inspection — NOT an error in the application code path. Mechanism: createFlatProxy responds to ANY string property access by returning a recursive sub-proxy; createRecursiveProxy then treats the last path segment as a tRPC call type via `clientCallTypeMap`; non-procedure keys (`getQueryCache`, `fetch`, etc.) map to `undefined` → `client[undefined](...)` crashes. **Reproduction evidence (2026-05-22 ~8:00 PM GMT+8)**: freshly registered `trpcbug@test.local` + bound `Test Dept` → loaded /app → `trpc.departments.myBoundDepartmentIds.useQuery()` returned `status: "success"` with `data: ["cmpgvke8...phaa3"]` in 502ms, `fetchFailureCount: 0`, `error: null`, `observersCount: 1` (verified via fiber-walk with strict `QueryClient` instance guard that avoids touching the proxy). Self-call via speed-dial tile → calls.initiate mutation 70ms → LiveKit room joined cleanly, no tRPC-related console errors. Multiple reloads + StrictMode dev double-mount: query stable in success state every time. **#14 in-call yellow-dot + #15 incoming-call dialog UNBLOCKED.** Zero source-code changes on this branch — resolution is purely the lessons.md + governance updates. 2 NEW typed lesson entries: 🔴 [[trpc-proxy-debug-inspection-trap]] (the mechanism — prevents rediscovery) + 🟡 [[trpc-client-procedure-type-missing]] RESOLUTION (answers the 3 open questions from the original 🔴; cites the cascade-fix in [[fresh-client-presence-snapshot-race]]). Original 🔴 entry left intact as historical record. Pre-merge validation: pnpm lint ✓ 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings unchanged), pnpm typecheck ✓ 0 errors across 8 packages, pnpm test 270/270 ✓ (unchanged from d364462 baseline — no new tests, no test deletions), pnpm build ✓ Middleware 141 kB unchanged (zero source diff), pnpm audit --audit-level=critical ✓ exit 0 (1 HIGH pre-documented per [[nodemailer-cve-mitigation]]).
